chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّهُ مَنْ عَرَفَ إِمَامَهُ لَمْ يَضُرَّهُ تَقَدَّمَ هَذَا الْأَمْرُ أَوْ تَأَخَّرَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 84 – The one who recognises his Imam<sup>asws</sup>, it would not harm him whether this matter (Rising of Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup>) is brought forward or delayed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (190/ 4)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (190/ 4)

parts.text: عَبْدِ الْعَظِيمِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحَسَنِيِّ

text: مَا ضَرَّ مَنْ مَاتَ مُنْتَظِراً لِأَمْرِنَا أَلَّا يَمُوتَ فِي وَسَطِ فُسْطَاطِ الْمَهْدِيِّ وَ عَسْكَرِهِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Ali Al Alawy, from Sahl Bin Jamhour, from Abdul Azeem Bin Abdullah Al Hasany, from Al Hassan Bin Al Husayn Al Urany, from Ali Bin Hashim, from his father,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘He would not be disadvantaged, the one who dies awaiting our<sup>asws</sup> matter, if he could not die in the middle of the tent of Al-Mahdi<sup>asws</sup> and his<sup>asws</sup> army’.
en.sarwar: 6. al-Husayn ibn Ali al-‘Alawi fromSahl ibn Jumhur from ‘Abd al-‘Azim Ibrahim ‘Abdallah al-Hassani fro al-Hassan ibn al-Husayn al-‘Arni from Ali from Ali ibn Hashim from his father from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “One who would expecting the coming of our task (the rise of al-Mahdi with Divine Authority) he his not suffered any loss of not dying in the tents of al-Mahdi and in his army.”
